items.name: Breakfast Sandwich
items.description: Spiced fresh egg, Italian cappicollo, house hot sauce, tomato and mozzarella cheese. Served on a toasted ciabatta bun.
items.simplified_description: A sandwich with spiced egg, Italian ham, hot sauce, tomato, and cheese on ciabatta.

items.name: Joe's Special
items.description: Three fine Italian meats. Mortadella, Capicollo, and Calabrese Salami, along with cheese, lettuce, and our house dressing.
items.simplified_description: A sandwich with three types of Italian meats, cheese, lettuce, and dressing.

items.name: Artichoke Turkey
items.description: Artichoke hearts, roasted turkey breast, our house dressing, lettuce, and cheese. Major heart friendly Italian food.
items.simplified_description: A sandwich with artichokes, turkey, dressing, lettuce, and cheese.

items.name: Beef Meatloaf
items.description: A thick slice of seasoned oven roasted lean meatloaf, with Peppino’s fresh tomato sauce, mozzarella, and parmesan cheese.
items.simplified_description: A slice of meatloaf with tomato sauce and cheese.

items.name: BLT with Cheese
items.description: Bacon, lettuce, tomato, and cheese, all served on a Peppino baguette with our house dressing.
items.simplified_description: A BLT sandwich with cheese on a baguette.

items.name: Calabrese Delight
items.description: Spicy calabrese salami, hot banana peppers, cheese, and tomatoes. No lettuce here, have it southern Italian style.
items.simplified_description: A spicy sandwich with salami, hot peppers, cheese, and tomatoes.

items.name: Capicollo
items.description: Lean capicollo ham, cheese, and lettuce served on a Peppino baguette with our house dressing.
items.simplified_description: A sandwich with capicollo ham, cheese, and lettuce on a baguette.

items.name: Chicken Alla Parmigiana
items.description: Two tender chicken breasts, marinated in tomato sauce, and smothered in mozzarella and parmesan cheese.
items.simplified_description: Chicken breasts in tomato sauce with mozzarella and parmesan.

items.name: Chicken Alla Parmiagana - Cacciatore Style
items.description: Take the chicken Parmigiana, and make it magnifico by adding roasted red peppers.
items.simplified_description: Chicken Parmigiana with added roasted red peppers.

items.name: Classic
items.description: Mild genoa salami, mortadella, our house dressing, lettuce, and cheese.
items.simplified_description: A classic sandwich with salami, mortadella, dressing, lettuce, and cheese.

items.name: Crantastic Turkey
items.description: Roasted turkey breast, lettuce, cheese, and a special blend of fresh cranberries and mayo dressing.
items.simplified_description: Turkey sandwich with lettuce, cheese, cranberries, and mayo.

items.name: Da Nico's
items.description: Capicollo, calabrese salami, mortadella, meatballs, hot peppers, cheese, and lettuce. Sure to fill any appetite.
items.simplified_description: A hearty sandwich with multiple meats, cheese, and hot peppers.

items.name: Ham and Cheese
items.description: Ham, cheese, lettuce, and our house dressing. Simple but so goooood!
items.simplified_description: A simple ham and cheese sandwich with lettuce.

items.simplified_description: A roast beef sandwich with lettuce and cheese.

items.simplified_description: A meatball sandwich with sauce and cheese.
